name: Chalice Mining Limited
description: Chalice Mining Limited is an Australian-based mineral exploration and development company. The company is primarily focused on its flagship Gonneville Nickel-Copper-PGE Project, located in Western Australia, which is a major greenfield discovery of palladium, platinum, nickel, copper, and cobalt. Chalice is dedicated to exploring and developing high-grade mineral resources to support the global transition toward a decarbonized economy.
